rationale: Public-fork LFS upload to omniscale-ai/reasoning-scale2 is denied by GitHub for the project owner account (confirmed during t0017 PR #29 merge). The working pattern is ghostscript /ebook compression of large PDFs, already adopted in t0017 (24.4 MB Li2024 PDF compressed to 3.8 MB). LFS re-fetch is structurally infeasible and superseded; rejecting after t0016 already demoted to low.
